name: Herbion
description: Herbion offers a Naturals Hair Oil that combines Almond, Olive, and Coconut Oil, providing nourishment that strengthens, moisturizes, and conditions hair. This product helps prevent hair loss and enhances shine, with the benefit of quick absorption for effective overnight treatment in just one hour.

name: Avon
description: Avon offers the Advance Techniques Supreme Oils Treatment Serum, designed for long, demanding hair, and infused with five precious oils to provide glossy hair with a radiant shine.

name: WOW Skin Science India Ltd
description: BuyWOW offers a 10 in 1 Active Hair Oil that is cold-pressed and free from mineral oil, silicones, and synthetic fragrances, designed to reduce hair fall and promote a healthy scalp and hair. This product highlights the company's commitment to using natural bio-active ingredients and provides multiple benefits for hair care.

name: Golden Pearl Cosmetics (Pvt) Ltd.
description: Golden Pearl Cosmetics (Pvt) Ltd offers Golden Pearl Hair Oil, which is formulated with natural oils and herbal extracts to enhance hair's shine, silkiness, and thickness. This hair oil quickly absorbs into the hair, making it more manageable and frizz-free.

name: Sesa Care Private Limited
description: The company highlights its commitment to Ayurvedic principles, offering a unique Non-Sticky Hair Oil in Lotion that combines the nourishment of traditional hair oil with a non-greasy formula. This product features 17 Ayurvedic herbs and 7 oils, promoting healthy hair from within while ensuring a beautiful appearance.

name: Sivaroma Naturals
description: Sivaroma Naturals is a prominent manufacturer and supplier of hair oil fragrances in India, committed to providing high-quality, ethically produced natural oils. With a production capacity of over 150 tons per day and a focus on quality and purity, they ensure customer satisfaction through their diverse product offerings.

name: Soulflower Co Ltd
description: Soulflower specializes in natural and organic hair care solutions, offering 100% pure, certified organic Rosemary Oil among its products. The company's commitment to clean beauty and small-batch production ensures high-quality hair care options.

name: Umendra Exports Pvt. Ltd.
description: Umendra Exports offers high-quality personal care products, including Hair Food with Olive Oil, and specializes in private label manufacturing, allowing clients to rebrand and sell these products under their own identity. Their commitment to cruelty-free principles and customized manufacturing ensures that clients receive reliable and affordable solutions tailored to their specifications.

name: Bo International
description: The company specializes in the formulation and production of natural personal care products, including a range of herbal baby hair oils. Their products are made from 100% organic and chemical-free ingredients, offering benefits like hydration and stronger hair while soothing the dry scalp.

name: Ohria Ayurveda
description: Ohria Ayurveda offers a Healthy Hair Oil combo pack, meticulously formulated with natural ingredients to nourish and strengthen hair. Their products, like the Japa Pushpa Thailam and Banyan Root Hair Tonic, are designed to address hair fall and promote vitality, leveraging the transformative power of Ayurveda.
